themes.label: Spirit
themes.summary: This chapter highlights the Spirit’s presence, power, leading, or inner witness. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "But his father and his mother knew not that it was of the LORD, that he sought an occasion ag...". Word-study detail reinforces "מֹֽשְׁלִ֥ים: had dominion - to rule".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "So his father went down unto the woman: and Samson made there a feast; for so used the young...". Word-study detail reinforces "יַֽעֲשׂ֖וּ: made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".
